metadata.title: Bistro Central Ljubljana | Modern Restaurant & Fine Dining
metadata.description: Modern restaurant landing page focused on menu presentation and table reservations. Experience fine dining in the heart of Ljubljana.
metadata.ogDescription: A modern dining experience in the heart of Ljubljana. Fresh local ingredients, seasonal menus, and an unforgettable atmosphere.

restaurant.name: Bistro Central
restaurant.tagline: A modern dining experience in the heart of Ljubljana

about.p1: Nestled in the vibrant heart of Ljubljana, Bistro Central has been a cornerstone of the city's culinary scene since 2018. Our kitchen combines traditional Slovenian flavors with contemporary European techniques, creating dishes that honor our heritage while embracing innovation.
about.p2: Every ingredient tells a story. We source locally from Slovenian farms and the Adriatic coast, ensuring that each plate reflects the freshness and diversity of our region. Our seasonal menu evolves with nature, offering a new experience with every visit.
about.p3: Whether you're joining us for an intimate dinner, a celebratory gathering, or a casual lunch, our warm atmosphere and attentive service make every moment at Bistro Central truly memorable.

truffleRisotto.name: Truffle Risotto
truffleRisotto.description: Creamy Arborio rice with black truffle, aged Parmesan, and a drizzle of truffle oil.

grilledSeaBass.name: Grilled Sea Bass
grilledSeaBass.description: Fresh Adriatic sea bass with roasted vegetables, capers, and lemon butter sauce.

beefTenderloin.name: Beef Tenderloin
beefTenderloin.description: Premium beef tenderloin with red wine reduction, roasted potatoes, and seasonal greens.

wildMushroomPasta.name: Wild Mushroom Pasta
wildMushroomPasta.description: Handmade tagliatelle with a medley of wild mushrooms, garlic, and fresh herbs.

capreseSalad.name: Caprese Salad
capreseSalad.description: Heirloom tomatoes, fresh buffalo mozzarella, basil, and aged balsamic glaze.

tiramisu.name: Tiramisu
tiramisu.description: Classic Italian dessert with espresso-soaked ladyfingers, mascarpone cream, and cocoa.

bruschettaTrio.name: Bruschetta Trio
bruschettaTrio.description: Three artisan bruschettas: tomato & basil, ricotta & honey, and olive tapenade.

pannaCotta.name: Panna Cotta
pannaCotta.description: Silky vanilla panna cotta with seasonal berry compote and mint.

lambRack.name: Lamb Rack
lambRack.description: Herb-crusted rack of lamb with rosemary jus, gratin dauphinois, and roasted baby carrots.

octopusCarpaccio.name: Octopus Carpaccio
octopusCarpaccio.description: Thinly sliced Adriatic octopus with citrus vinaigrette, capers, and microgreens.

lobsterLinguine.name: Lobster Linguine
lobsterLinguine.description: Fresh linguine tossed with lobster tail, cherry tomatoes, garlic, and white wine sauce.

duckConfit.name: Duck Confit
duckConfit.description: Slow-cooked duck leg with crispy skin, served with lentils du Puy and orange glaze.

burrataProciutto.name: Burrata & Prosciutto
burrataProciutto.description: Creamy burrata cheese with San Daniele prosciutto, arugula, and aged balsamic.

searedTunaTataki.name: Seared Tuna Tataki
searedTunaTataki.description: Lightly seared yellowfin tuna with sesame crust, ponzu sauce, and pickled ginger.

gnocchiAlPesto.name: Gnocchi al Pesto
gnocchiAlPesto.description: Pillowy potato gnocchi with homemade basil pesto, pine nuts, and Pecorino Romano.

chocolateFondant.name: Chocolate Fondant
chocolateFondant.description: Warm dark chocolate fondant with a molten center, served with vanilla ice cream.

slovenianStrudel.name: Slovenian Strudel
slovenianStrudel.description: Traditional apple strudel with cinnamon, raisins, and a dusting of powdered sugar.
